title: Aurora, 60786, Baby Gigi Giraffe Pram Toy, Brown
features: Aurora’s gorgeous Gigi Giraffe Baby Pram Rattle
Designed especially for babies with embroidered eyes and using super soft plush materials
Gigi is printed with a baby giraffe coloured pattern and features a white clip to attach to items.
A beautiful baby giraffe toy for prams, pushchairs and car seats and as a gift for newborns, baby showers and Christenings.
description: Product Description Aurora’s Gigi baby Giraffe Collection features a wonderful range of giraffe designs for babies. This is a gorgeous baby pull down pram toy with rattle. Made from super soft and cuddly giraffe patterned lamboa material, Gigi has embroidered eyes and accents for complete softness. This giraffe has an elasticated pulldown and has a matching white ring to attach to a multitude of items. This is a perfect gift for a nursery, baby shower, birthday, christening or gifting for new parents. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Safety Warning Remove handtags before giving to a child. Hand wash only
